title: Set up Framer Motion animations in Next.js
summary: Add Framer Motion v11 for declarative animations, page transitions, gesture-based interactions, and scroll-triggered effects in Next.js App Router.
declaration: I will set up Framer Motion v11 for animations and transitions in your Next.js application. Framer Motion works as Client Components only in App Router. If you prefer CSS animations or another library, say so before I begin.
